what: Built-fork verification for the Wave A1 (QJL CPU SIMD TUs) + A2 (Vulkan multi-block staging) + D1 (Vulkan fused-attn graph dispatch) wiring. Ran on the dev workstation Intel Arc/Xe iGPU (Mesa ANV).

host.cpu: Intel(R) Core(TM) Ultra 9 275HX (Arrow Lake-HX, 24 logical cores) — AVX2 + AVX-VNNI, no AVX-512
host.gpu: Intel(R) Graphics (ARL) — Intel open-source Mesa ANV driver, Vulkan api 1.4.318, warp size 32, no int dot, no matrix cores

build.note: Built with ELIZA_DFLASH_SKIP_SERVER_STRUCTURED_OUTPUT=1 — the v0.4.0-milady fork's tools/server/server.cpp lacks the lazy-GBNF / json_schema / continue_final_message upstream features the concurrent W4 structured-output patcher hard-requires, which is the documented expected blocker. The skip env is local-diagnostics-only; it does not change the default build path.
build.result: OK — built=1, host-incompat-skipped=0, failed=0. ggml-cpu, ggml-vulkan, llama, server, all examples built. Patchers applied cleanly: cpu-simd-kernels (13 QJL TUs mirrored + CMakeLists regenerated + QJL_HAVE_* defines), vulkan-kernels (15 standalone .comp staged incl. 4 *_multi + 2 fused_attn_*; 01/02 patches + runtime graph dispatch).

cpuSimd.note: Confirms -DGGML_AVX_VNNI=ON was passed (hostHasAvxVnni() true on this Arrow Lake host), the avxvnni TU compiled with __AVXVNNI__ active, QJL_HAVE_AVXVNNI was defined, and the runtime cpuid dispatcher selected the AVX-VNNI int8-sketch score path. Measured prior: 5.25x QJL int8 AVX-VNNI vs fp32-AVX2.

vulkanDispatchSmoke.device: Intel(R) Graphics (ARL) — Intel open-source Mesa ANV driver

routes.label: GGML_OP_FUSED_ATTN_QJL_TBQ
routes.status: PASS — NEW (this work): single-q-pos fused attention, n_heads=4 n_kv_heads=2 n_tokens=8, vs eliza_fused_attn_qjl_tbq3 reference

notRun.vulkan-native-smoke: linux_vulkan_smoke.sh wrapper not exercised this pass; vulkan-dispatch-smoke directly links the built fork libggml-vulkan and is the substantive evidence.
notRun.kernelContractFlip: kernel-contract.json fusedAttn.runtimeStatus.vulkan was NOT flipped, and vulkan-runtime-dispatch-evidence.json was NOT updated — that coordination (+ check_kernel_contract.mjs guard loosening) is the release/evidence agent's call per the op contract §7. make kernel-contract is still green (OK kernels=6 targets=23 manifestNames=6).
